text:
Every program that outputs sounds to the pcm0 (which is my sb live), produces a lot of static and a little of real sound.  Xmms, wsoundserver, mpg123, all produce static.  I wish this could be fixed, I remember my sb16 worked perfectly in 3.1 so I'm guessing it wouldn't be hard to fixed.

Fix: 

sorry.
How-To-Repeat: Actually, this problem was reported by many.
